title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: DANIEL MEYER MEMORIAL POOL SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space. 1705 Homes Avenue Ashland, OR 97520 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Recreation Swim: Tuesday-Thursday 3:15pm-5:15pm, Friday 3:15pm-5:30pm, Saturday 1pm-7pm, Sunday 3pm-7pm Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Ages 2-12 $3 Ages 13 and older: $4 DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Jackson County Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
